text: ... My gastro and I, how do I position myself? So I'm going to tell you how I see myself in relation to my patients. I think my role is to walk beside you. It's not to walk in front of you and treat you. It's not to be behind you; it's to walk beside you and accompany you. For that, I think the relationship has to be built on trust. And kindness. I think that's how it's going to work. ... ... ...
